# ProWorx Mobile Detailing

> Premium mobile auto detailing, paint correction, and ceramic coating in Charlotte, NC and surrounding areas.

## About

ProWorx Mobile Detailing is Charlotte's GYEON & IGL certified ceramic coating and paint protection specialist. We offer professional-grade ceramic coating packages with 1-year to 10-year protection, precision paint correction, and premium full detailing services. Serving Charlotte, Waxhaw, Matthews, Indian Trail, Mint Hill, Ballantyne, and surrounding areas with mobile service and convenient drop-off options. 5-star rated with 55+ reviews.

## Services

- Inside & Out Detailing (Standard from $233, Premium from $372, Elite from $464)
- Interior Detail (from $163)
- Exterior Detail (from $117)
- Ceramic Coating (GYEON certified — 1yr from $499, 3yr from $899, 10yr from $1,599)
- Paint Correction (1-step enhancement, 2-step, multi-stage)
- Fleet Detailing (volume pricing, contact for quote)
- Boat Detailing (exterior from $250, full detail from $600)
- Monthly Maintenance Plans (from $60.77/month)

## Contact

- Website: https://www.proworxdetailing.com

- Address: 3008 Collaroy Rd, Waxhaw, NC 28173

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 9:30 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:30 AM – 3:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Service Areas

Charlotte, Waxhaw, Matthews, Indian Trail, Mint Hill, Pineville, Monroe, Ballantyne, Myers Park, SouthPark, Weddington, Marvin, Fort Mill SC, Tega Cay SC, Huntersville, Concord, Lake Norman
